flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.4k → $30.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Arkansas are 34% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($58.2k vs $43.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Arkansas rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (24.0k → 28.7k).
